title: You Do Not Need to Learn AI First: A 5-Minute Conversation Recipe
thesis: Non-technical adults and teens can start using AI agents by copying one plain-language prompt into any capable model, letting the agent interview them about an everyday problem and suggest what to ask next.

claims.claim: A single model-agnostic starter prompt is a more effective onboarding artifact for non-technical users than a feature list or vendor tutorial.

evidence.snippet: ChatGPT can answer questions, help with writing, analysis, coding, and many other tasks through conversation.

counterevidence.summary: Some users may still prefer structured tutorials or video walkthroughs depending on learning style.

claims.claim: The AI agent itself can act as the tutor, so newcomers do not need to study AI before they start using it.

evidence.snippet: Claude can assist with analysis, writing, coding, math, and answering questions across many domains.

counterevidence.summary: Basic digital literacy and an understanding of when to verify facts are still prerequisites for safe use.

claims.claim: Suggesting the next question or direction after each answer removes the blank-page problem and keeps the experience experiential rather than instructional.

evidence.snippet: Gemini can engage in multi-turn conversations and help users explore topics iteratively.

counterevidence.summary: The effectiveness depends on the quality of the starter prompt and the user's willingness to engage.

claims.claim: Two short annotated transcripts are enough to teach the pattern: one proving intelligence through document explanation, and one proving productivity through one-input-multiple-outputs automation.

evidence.snippet: Conversational AI can summarize, explain, and draft content from user-provided inputs.

counterevidence.summary: Two examples may not cover all reader contexts; additional examples may be needed after reader feedback.

agentInstructions: Use claim IDs as the retrieval unit.
Treat maturity=seed as an explicit uncertainty marker.
Do not present AI agents as all-knowing or safe for high-stakes decisions without human review.

reviews.notes: Sibling-agent review against article-proposal-ideation eval-card. Privacy scan passed. No proprietary or personal content detected.
Human author approved the draft and assets for review publication.
